textByHash.03b095181746a904546906da0209aca7167bdf79: -, you are not trusted, this is secret area. Less questions! I will say that it's the inner core of the city though.
textByHash.0e756222545ff1b2fb345c16b18fc1bc713746a8: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!
textByHash.1fa2a69085254c828ed8403ee2abe23a591c05c5: Ah, trusted and most capable JalYt, this is the city of Mor Ul Rek. It has grand central inferno, our birthing pool. Go! See for yourself -
textByHash.414820b79e821ebc3309d1fa6f7bdad5a0fe3f6b: That what you are... you agile and quick no?
textByHash.4f434fabd50a83ee00756b186c1f2e367070d353: It is not for us to help. You must fight alone.
textByHash.60ea8c8ed988a95e40290ab77c913a3e421f469d: That what you are... you tough and strong no?
textByHash.6774fc1a8aef3e43896812f4686cf6a1da65e268: Silly JalYt, I am TzHaar-Ket, one of the guardians of our city.
textByHash.6e736cc65eb8a528b8e6f7b75490d4fcb2a56a76: Gold is bad currency, I have no use for JalYt coins.
textByHash.858fe804779442b516700d685ee2f6c62699d0ae: JalYt are not trusted. Nor are capable of withstanding the heat. The features of the city are a secret.
textByHash.91ed756d14591822e9dfdea360ef7f16d4044408: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?
textByHash.b952dcd1149cfe1c96995a545b9ec07a8772bf59: Back off JalYt--, trust me when I say our obsidian bodies are harder.
textByHash.c6138825516d9c6cf8460315e6f85a51852c5692: I suppose so, I'll grant you access to Mor Ul Rek. The guards will open the gates for you, you are the first JalYt to pass these gates!
textByHash.c776313e37d942dcef24ec063bad309e2e5ba537: -, I suppose that is perfectly acceptable, but it would take lots to convince.
textByHash.ce880942f9a980bc19606001cc152010d816ec9e: That what you are... you user of mystic powers, no?
textByHash.d501edf5f7f3d5a7059da3e6ce899303f0155bc3: There are the wise TzHaar-Mej who guide us, the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food, and the skilled TzHaar-Hur who craft our homes and tools.
textByHash.e664bb7d17f0e43c1f0b586d4b9bb84fafa3ef30: [laugh] funny JalYt try to speak language, why do you put that accent on when attempting it?
